response.overview: Openly gay city kid Evan Brooks is sent to a Midwest ranch with one condition: compete on the high school rodeo team or lose his dream of culinary school in Paris. His biggest obstacle? Team captain Colt Maddox — the straight, golden-boy cowboy whose shot at going pro depends on winning State. After Evan is forced to be Colt's stableboy, their rivalry turns into something neither of them expected. In a town where being gay is more dangerous than bull riding, falling in love could cost them everything.
response.title: Stableboy
